svg.title: The problem of incident chaos and the solution of autonomous resolution
svg.desc: Two column comparison. Left column shows five symptoms of incident chaos. Right column shows five capabilities of autonomous incident resolution.
svg.text: Incident chaos is an engineering problem
Modern systems are visible, not resolved. Observability shows failure;
it does not close the loop. This project does.
Logs, metrics, traces make failure visible.
They do not, by themselves, resolve it.
4. Runbooks live in wikis, not in the loop
Detect, diagnose, decide, and act with
CLOSE THE LOOP, LOWER THE MTTR
The next phase of incident response is not more dashboards.
It is an agent loop that detects, diagnoses, and acts, with guardrails.
Autonomous incident resolution with Kafka, LangGraph, and RAG.
